case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MONTINIQUE ISLAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64374141) AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-10-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $352.40 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 67046644) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64374141) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100052997) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64374141) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 64374141) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 67868110) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,216.97 AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-22-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100054223), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-17-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTINIQUE ISLAND $1,565.67 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,837.57, SEE SCANNED DOC
